Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CLAUDE:', d['claude']['score'] if d.get\('claude'\) else 'FAIL'\); print\('GEMINI:', d['gemini']['score'] if d.get\('gemini'\) else 'FAIL'\); print\('GEMINI summary:', d['gemini']['summary'] if d.get\('gemini'\) else ''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CLAUDE:', d['claude']['score'] if d.get\('claude'\) else 'FAIL'\); print\('GEMINI:', d['gemini']['score'] if d.get\('gemini'\) else 'FAIL'\); print\('GEMINI summary:', d['gemini']['summary'] if d.get\('gemini'\) else 'none'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('claude'\); g=d.get\('gemini'\); print\('CLAUDE:', c['score'] if c else 'FAIL', '|', c['verdict'] if c else ''\); print\('GEMINI:', g['score'] if g else 'FAIL', '|', g['verdict'] if g else ''\); print\(\); print\('Gemini summary:', g['summary'] if g else 'none'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('claude'\); g=d.get\('gemini'\); print\('CLAUDE:', \(c or {}\).get\('score','FAIL'\), '|', \(c or {}\).get\('verdict',''\)\); print\('GEMINI:', \(g or {}\).get\('score','FAIL'\), '|', \(g or {}\).get\('verdict',''\)\); print\(\); print\('Gemini summary:', \(g or {}\).get\('summary', 'none'\)\)")
